name: use-clipboard
description: Copy text to the clipboard and get a self-resetting 'copied' flag back, so a button can flash 'Copied!' then return to normal. Wraps the async Clipboard API; copy never throws and surfaces failures via error.

intents: copy text to the clipboard with a copied confirmation
write to the clipboard and reset the state after a delay
examples:
const { copy, copied } = useClipboard();
<button onClick={() => copy(url)}>{copied ? 'Copied!' : 'Copy link'}</button>
